_status: API export not enabled. Endpoint verification required.
_checklist: [ ] Confirm exact wFirma PZ API endpoint (POST /api2/documents/warehousedocuments/add.json ?)
[ ] Obtain wFirma API credentials (app_id, app_key, access_key)
[ ] Test on sandbox/test company (odrębna firma testowa w wFirma)
[ ] Compare API-created PZ with manually-entered PZ — line-by-line
[ ] Verify Nazwa towaru encoding (Polish chars: ą ę ó ś ź ż ć ń ł)
[ ] Verify numeric format accepted by API (e.g. 1234.56 vs 1234,56)
[ ] Verify unit (J.m.) accepted values: szt. / para / zest.
[ ] Confirm Kontrahent ID lookup (by NIP or by name?)
_notes: This file is a planning artifact only. No API calls are made from it.
When Mode 3 is activated, a new routes_wfirma_api.py will be created.
All production wFirma API calls must go through the Python service, never directly from browser JS.
Duty A00 is already included in net_price_pln — do not add it again as a separate cost.
